ab: Pito ko toki tahiraay to ikongkoan kako anini.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Misatapng to minanam, micomoday to ko singsi, sowalsa ko hanciw; katomireng! mita’ong!
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Sata’angay hahanay niyam ko ngiha "nga’ay ho singsi."
Minanam i, pakafana’en no singsi kita to sa’osi no ’Amis.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the ’Amis language of numbers.

ab: toolen niyam ko singsi misa’osi, romadiw kami to sa’osi a radiw.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Adihayay ko ninanaman no mako a sowal to no ’Amis.
Malingad kako to romi’ami’ad a mitilid, minanam kako to romi’ami’ad to sowal no ’Amis, o papatengilen ko wina to pisano ’Amis ako.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the ’Amis language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
